name: 騎神托爾丹討滅絕嘆殲殛戰
nameEn: The Minstrel's Ballad: Thordan's Reign - King Thordan
mnemonic: B1 King Thordan 騎神托爾丹：Spear of the Fury 神武槍 + Heavensflame 蒼穹熾焰 + 7 圓桌騎士。
notes: HW 3.2 HW 騎神托爾丹絕嘆殲殛戰（Lv 60）。Boss 依序為 King Thordan 騎神托爾丹。重點：依各 boss 機制走位、add 速秒、tankbuster 與 raidwide 配合減傷與團補。

mechanics.description: Attaches Burning Chains to pairs of players and places multiple large AoEs under random players over a period of 3 seconds.；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Heavensflame: 天焰

bosses.name: 騎神托爾丹
mnemonic: King Thordan 騎神托爾丹 機制：Spear of the Fury 神武槍 + Heavensflame 蒼穹熾焰 + 7 圓桌騎士。

mechanics.description: A 20 second cast that deals damage based on Ser Zephirin's remaining health. Functions as a DPS check — deal as much damage to Ser Zephirin as possibl；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Sacred Cross 神聖

bosses.name: Phase 2b: Ser Zephirin, Ignasse, Paulecrain, and Vellguine
bosses.nameEn: Phase 2b: Ser Zephirin, Ignasse, Paulecrain, and Vellguine

mechanics.description: Grants one knight Sword of the Heavens and the other Shield of the Heavens. If these buffs are already active, the knights will instead swap their buf；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Divine Right 藤

bosses.name: Phase 2c: Ser Janlenoux and Ser Adelphel
bosses.nameEn: Phase 2c: Ser Janlenoux and Ser Adelphel

mechanics.description: Places a black AoE underneath every player that will grow over time. Explodes after 6 seconds. Can be simplified by stacking together prior, ensuring；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Dimensional Collapse 次元崩塌

bosses.name: Phase 2d: Ser Grinnaux and Ser Haumeric
bosses.nameEn: Phase 2d: Ser Grinnaux and Ser Haumeric

mechanics.description: Four random players will be marked. Four comets will drop on these players, dealing minor damage in a small AoE around them. Do not stand near these p；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Holy Meteor 神聖

bosses.name: Phase 2e: Ser Noudenet and Ser Guerrique
bosses.nameEn: Phase 2e: Ser Noudenet and Ser Guerrique

mechanics.description: One healer will be marked with a green marker. This player will be Down for the Count and given two stacks of ；依預兆走位處理。
